sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, text_column VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_table SET text_column = 'goodbye world' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT instr(text_column, 'world') FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, instr(text_column, 'hello') AS position FROM test_table;
